newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q2 FY26 results (sales +8.4%, EPS $2.51) were late January; IRIS Factory Automation and Hydradyne acquisitions are ongoing prior items. The +3.7% move is flow-driven drift.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the strict latent-node screen, nothing new since June 9 changes the motion/automation-distribution aggregation thesis; the +3.7% grind higher at ~28x is no-news drift. Prior verdict already reconciled rank — hold flat.
verdicts.bull: Automation/fluid-power distribution aggregates latent industrial+datacenter demand before OEMs are obvious; IRIS/Hydradyne deepen automation reach.
verdicts.neutral: Quality compounder but only tangential AI-node link; organic growth modest (~2.2%).
verdicts.bear: Distributor, not a chokepoint; rich ~28x multiple after +29% YTD on no incremental catalyst.
